channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Could Angela Prichard Have Been Saved?
item.description: A woman repeatedly called police for help when she was attacked, stalked, and intimidated by her husband. It did not stop him from killing her. 48 Hours...

item.title: Qatari mediators head to Tehran to finalize peace agreement, diplomat reports
item.description: President Trump stated that the Strait of Hormuz will reopen immediately after the memorandum of understanding is signed.

item.title: Iran live updates: Trump says deal will be signed, Tehran says it will 'wait and see'
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: WATCH: Little League umpire gets the call of a lifetime
item.description: Sawyer Sparks, the 18-year-old Little League umpire previously featured on World News Tonight, has been invited to umpire an exhibition baseball game.
